CREATE TABLE test_group_concat (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT sys.group_concat(value) FROM test_group_concat WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.group_concat(value) FROM test_group_concat GROUP BY id;
SELECT sys.group_concat(value) FROM test_group_concat HAVING id = 2;
SELECT sys.group_concat(sub.value) FROM (SELECT value, id FROM test_group_concat WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS sub GROUP BY sub.id;
CREATE TABLE another_table (a_id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT at.description, sys.group_concat(tgc.value) FROM another_table at JOIN test_group_concat tgc ON at.a_id = tgc.id GROUP BY at.description;
SELECT sys.group_concat(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_group_concat WHERE value LIKE 'A%') AS filtered;
SELECT sys.group_concat(COALESCE(value, 'Unknown')) FROM test_group_concat WHERE id = 3;
SELECT sys.group_concat(value) FROM test_group_concat GROUP BY id ORDER BY id ASC;
